zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabella Trenchard於1346年出生在英國戴文時，她的父親Giles Trenchard51歲，母親Christian Dunster De Mohun48歲。她和Thomas Tremayne至少有13個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1408年在英國戴文拉梅頓享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabella Trenchard于1346年出生在英国戴文时，她的父亲Giles Trenchard51岁，母亲Christian Dunster De Mohun48岁。她和Thomas Tremayne至少有13个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1408年在英国戴文拉梅頓享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: Trenchard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southwestern; of Norman origin) and French: nickname from Old French trenche, a derivative of trenchier ‘to cut, hack, slice’ (compare Trench ) + the suffix -ard, for someone skilled in cutting, perhaps for a swordsman, butcher, or ditch-cutter.

variants.name: Trench
meanings: English and Scottish: from Middle English trench ‘path cut through woods; cutting or ditch’ (Old French trenche, a derivative of trenchier ‘to cut, hack, slice’). The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived by a path or ditch, or habitational, from a place so named, such as Trench Lane in Huddington (Worcestershire), Trench in Ellesmere (Shropshire), or The Trench in Hildenborough (Kent). It may perhaps also be a nickname for someone who cut ditches.
Irish (of French origin): habitational name from La Tranche (Poitou).

History: The Trench family that hold the Irish earldom of Clancarty trace their descent from Frederic de la Tranche, who settled in Northumbria from France c. 1575. They became established in Ireland in the 17th century, when Frederick Trench went there and purchased an estate in Galway in 1631.

nameMeanings.name: Isabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabella Trenchard was born in 1346, in Devon, England, her father, Giles Trenchard, was 51 and her mother, Christian Dunster De Mohun, was 48. She had at least 13 sons and 1 daughter with Thomas Tremayne. She died in 1408, in Lamerton, Devon, England, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabella Trenchard est née en 1346, à Devon, Angleterre, son père, Giles Trenchard, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Christian Dunster De Mohun, avait 48 ans. Elle a eu au moins 13 fils et 1 fille avec Thomas Tremayne. Elle est décédée en 1408, à Lamerton, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabella Trenchard 1346 in Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Giles Trenchard 51 und ihre Mutter Christian Dunster De Mohun 48. Sie hatte mit Thomas Tremayne mindestens 13 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1408 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Lamerton, Devon, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella Trenchard è nata il nel 1346 nel Devon, England, sua padre, Giles Trenchard, aveva 51 anni e sua madre, Christian Dunster De Mohun, aveva 48 anni. Lei avuto almeno 13 figli e 1 figlia con Thomas Tremayne. Morì nel 1408, nel Lamerton, Devon, England, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabella Trenchardが1346年にイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父Giles Trenchardは51歳，母Christian Dunster De Mohunは48歳であった。彼女はThomas Tremayneとの間に少なくとも13人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1408年にイギリスデボンラムルトンで62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabella Trenchard(이)가 1346년 영국 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Giles Trenchard(은)는 51세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Christian Dunster De Mohun(은)는 48세였다. 그녀는 Thomas Tremayne(와)과 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1408년 영국 데폰 램르턴에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella Trenchard nasceu em 1346, em Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Giles Trenchard, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Christian Dunster De Mohun, tinha 48 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 13 filhos e 1 filha com Thomas Tremayne. Ela faleceu em 1408, em Lamerton, Devon, Inglaterra, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabella Trenchard родилась в 1346 г. в местности девон, Англия, её отцу по имени Giles Trenchard было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Christian Dunster De Mohun, 48. У неё было по крайней мере 13 сыновей и 1 дочь от Thomas Tremayne. Она умерла в 1408 г. в местности лэмиртон, девон, Англия в возрасте 62 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabella Trenchard nació en 1346, en Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Giles Trenchard, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Christian Dunster De Mohun, tenía 48 años. Tuvo por lo menos 13 hijos y 1 hija con Thomas Tremayne. Murió en 1408, en Lamerton, Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 62 años.
